cookies.message: We use analytical telemetry to optimize performance. No personal data stored.

cookiesPolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPolicy.intro: This platform uses analytical metrics to anonymously understand user interaction and optimize system performance.
cookiesPolicy.whatAreCookies: Small local data fragments used strictly for performance telemetry and navigation analysis.
typesList: Anonymous analytics used to evaluate performance and improve user experience.
cookiesPolicy.manageText: You can accept or reject analytical cookies through the banner or your browser settings.
cookiesPolicy.personalDataTextPart1: No personal data is collected or stored through cookies on this platform.
cookiesPolicy.changesText: This policy may be updated occasionally to reflect infrastructure improvements.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: Privacy is a fundamental engineering principle. We only use anonymous metrics to evaluate platform performance.

sections.title: 1. Personal Data
sections.text: This website does not collect or store personal data.

sections.title: 2. Analytical Tools
sections.text: Traffic metrics are used only to measure system performance and usage patterns.

sections.title: 3. Contact
sections.text: Email communications are handled securely and never used for tracking.

sections.title: 4. Rights
sections.text: Since no personal data is stored, access or deletion requests do not apply.

sections.title: 5. Policy Changes
sections.text: Updates to our privacy infrastructure will always be reflected here.

solutia.title: Frontend Lead & Software Engineer
solutia.point1: Stepped beyond frontend scope to stabilize core infrastructure, managing complex PostgreSQL database migrations and engineering reliable CI/CD pipelines.
solutia.point2: Refactored and modularized key critical sections of a massive legacy codebase (navigating 5,000+ line monolithic files) to improve maintainability within tight project deadlines.
solutia.point3: Led technical direction for B2B platforms, bridging the gap between fragile legacy systems and modern architectural standards.

adidas.point5: Applied best practices in testing, accessibility, and performance optimization.

about.title: Engineering products that scale.
about.description:
I'm Fran Aragón, a Software Engineer specialized in building high-performance digital products.

I design and build scalable SaaS platforms, web applications, and native mobile systems that solve real business problems. My work focuses on clean architecture, performance, and long-term maintainability.

Currently, I work as a Software Engineer designing enterprise-grade architectures and scalable systems. Previously, I stabilized core infrastructure and led frontend architecture at Solutia, and built tools at adidas’ Innovation team used in global workflows.

I am also the founder behind HomeStocker, a native iOS ecosystem for smart inventory management.

Based in Prague. Working with companies worldwide.

overview.title: Overview
overview.paragraph: Baguira Suites Experiences is a luxury hospitality platform designed to elevate the digital presence of a boutique hotel in Calais, France. The project combines immersive storytelling, technical SEO, multilingual architecture and reservation workflows within a high-performance Next.js ecosystem.

baguira.title: Baguira Suites Experiences
baguira.label: Luxury Hospitality Experience Platform
baguira.subtitle: Luxury hospitality experience platform engineered for performance, visibility and conversion.

overview.title: Overview
overview.paragraph: Baguira Suites Experiences is a luxury hospitality platform designed to elevate the digital presence of a boutique hotel in Calais, France. The project combines immersive storytelling, technical SEO, multilingual architecture and reservation workflows within a high-performance Next.js ecosystem.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.paragraph1: Baguira required more than a website. The goal was to build a digital experience capable of reflecting the premium positioning of the brand while establishing a scalable technical foundation for future growth.
challenge.paragraph2: The platform needed to combine performance, technical SEO, online reservations, Airbnb and Booking.com multi-channel synchronization, internationalization and immersive visual storytelling without compromising Core Web Vitals.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.paragraph: The platform was built using Next.js App Router, TypeScript and a fully internationalized content architecture. Beyond the public-facing experience, the system integrates external hospitality infrastructure to synchronize reservations across multiple channels while providing a private environment for operations, reporting and day-to-day management. Every technical decision was focused on long-term maintainability, scalability and performance.

results.title: Results
results.paragraph: The platform achieved Lighthouse scores of 96 on mobile and 98 on desktop while maintaining an immersive visual experience and a technical SEO foundation designed to maximize international visibility.

philosophy.title: Engineering Philosophy
philosophy.quote: Engineering luxury experiences requires the same discipline as engineering enterprise systems: architecture first, aesthetics second.

cta.title: Building products for ambitious businesses.
cta.paragraph: I collaborate with a limited number of partners each year to design and engineer digital products that combine performance, scalability and business impact.
